title: Server state drilled 3+ levels must move to React Query
guideline: Data fetched in a useEffect and stored with useState, then passed down 3 or more component levels as props, is server state being hand-carried through the tree. Move the fetch into React Query (useQuery) — or SWR — and read it with the hook in the component that actually uses it. Intermediate components must not know about the data at all.

rule.message: server state must not be prop-drilled; fetch it with React Query where it is used

title: State mutated from below and shared across branches must use Context
guideline: When a useState value AND its setter are handed down as props — the setter so descendants can change it, the value fanning out to 2+ child branches (or the setter drilled 3+ levels) — the intent is a global change: one component updates, distant parts react. That is Context's job (or a store like Zustand). Put the pair in a Provider and read it with useContext where needed.

rule.message: shared mutable state must live in a Context (or store), not travel as value+setter props

title: No prop drilling deeper than 2 levels
guideline: A value passed through 3+ component boundaries, where the intermediates only forward it, couples the whole path to that prop. Restructure: composition (pass the rendered element instead of the data), Context, or a state library — depending on what the value is.

rule.message: prop drilled through 3+ component levels; restructure with composition, Context, or a store
